kharakorum,225,156,3	script	Aver De Dosh#cos_ect_kkrm	4_WHITETIGER,{
	disable_items;
	mes "[Aver De Dosh]";
	mes "ยินดีต้อนรับสู่ Fashion Stone!!";
	mes "เลือกคอสตูมที่ต้องการออฟชั่นให้ทรงพลังยิ่งขึ้น~";
	next;
	if (select("ออฟชั่นคอสตูม", "ยกเลิก") == 2) close;
	if (checkweight(1119,3) == 0) { mes "กระเป๋าคุณหนักเกินไป!"; close; }

	// 1. ตรวจสอบคอสตูมที่สวมใส่อยู่
	.@eq_top = getequipid(EQI_COSTUME_HEAD_TOP);
	.@eq_mid = getequipid(EQI_COSTUME_HEAD_MID);
	.@eq_low = getequipid(EQI_COSTUME_HEAD_LOW);
	if (.@eq_top == -1 && .@eq_mid == -1 && .@eq_low == -1) { mes "คุณต้องสวมใส่คอสตูมก่อนนะ"; close; }

	// 2. เมนูเลือกตามของที่ใส่จริง
	.@menu$ = (.@eq_top > -1 ? "ส่วนบน:" : "") + (.@eq_mid > -1 ? "ส่วนกลาง:" : "") + (.@eq_low > -1 ? "ส่วนล่าง:" : "") + "ยกเลิก";
	.@pick = select(.@menu$);
	if (.@pick == getarraysize(explode(.@menu$, ":"))) close;

	if (.@pick == 1) { .@part = EQI_COSTUME_HEAD_TOP; .@equip_id = .@eq_top; }
	else if (.@pick == 2) { .@part = EQI_COSTUME_HEAD_MID; .@equip_id = .@eq_mid; }
	else { .@part = EQI_COSTUME_HEAD_LOW; .@equip_id = .@eq_low; }

	// 3. ตรวจสอบ ID คอสตูมรองรับ
	switch(.@part) {
		case EQI_COSTUME_HEAD_TOP:
			if (inarray(explode("18740,18741,19294,19507,19515,19516,19517,19518,19519,19520,19521,19522,19523,19524,19525,19526,19527,19529,19537,19543,19544,19545,19546,19547,19548,19549,19573,19575,19576,19577,19585,19586,19587,19590,19592,19599,19602,19608,19613,19618,19625,19629,19630,19632,19633,19635,19637,19639,19643,19646,19647,19650,19653,19654,19655,19656,19657,19659,19665,19667,19677,19682,19684,19694,19702,19706,19712,19715,19719,19721,19728,19729,19731,19733,19737,19738,19739,19750,19758,19761,19762,19771,19782,19784,19786,19789,19790,19795,19796,19797,19799,19800,19807,19818,19824,19827,19828,19829,19831,19833,19835,19839,19842,19843,19844,19845,19847,19848,19851,19852,19858,19859,19860,19861,19862,19863,19865,19866,19874,19876,19878,19883,19884,19913,19931,19932,19934,19935,19936,19937,19939,19941,19955,19977,19980,19983,19984,20017,20036,20046,20049,20050,20057,20063,20064,20073,20074,20090,20092,20093,20094,20095,20096,20097,20114,20118,20119,20120,20121,20130,20133,20151,20157,20158,20159,20160,20161,20175,20181,20182,20184,20186,20197,20199,20200,20203,20205,20207,20208,20214,20225,20226,20231,20232,20233,20238,20242,20248,20249,20250,20262,20266,20269,20271,20272,20273,20277,20283,20433,20447,20452,20458,20463,20464,20467,20489,20491,31027,31031,31040,31062,31123,31125,31137,31139,31147,31149,31151,31158,31176,31177,31180,31200,31204,31249,31252,31314,31318,31329,31332,31582,31382,31385,31396,31405,31406,31407,31433,31439,31440,31451,31456,20227,31474,31475,31481,31489,31509,31529,31546,31564,31565,31573,31598,31624,19574,19578,19612,19710,19775,19823,19864,20402,31205,31415,19556,19746,19821,19849,19850,20481,31409", ","), .@equip_id) == -1) { mes "คอสตูมส่วนบนนี้ไม่รองรับ"; close; }
			setarray .@stone_id, 6636, 4700, 6637, 4710, 6638, 4730, 6639, 4720, 6640, 4740, 6641, 4750, 6716, 4926, 6740, 4930, 6741, 4805, 6790, 4936, 6791, 4937, 6792, 4938, 6943, 29028, 6944, 29030, 6999, 29013, 25000, 29032, 25068, 4807, 25069, 29053, 25171, 29159, 25172, 29156, 25304, 29359, 25409, 29423, 25413, 29428, 25417, 29432, 25445, 29460, 25450, 29464, 25453, 29468, 25490, 29477, 25494, 29481, 25498, 29485, 25706, 29513, 25710, 29517, 25714, 29521, 25800, 29613, 25804, 29617, 25808, 29621, 25843, 29651, 25846, 29655, 25850, 29659, 25855, 29664, 25859, 29668, 1000008, 310000, 1000012, 310004, 1000016, 310008, 1000214, 310181, 1000218, 310187, 1000222, 310191, 1000297, 310258, 1000301, 310262, 1000305, 310266; break;
		case EQI_COSTUME_HEAD_MID:
			if (inarray(explode("18742,19291,19509,19510,19511,19512,19550,19551,19603,19621,19624,19734,19735,19752,19755,19781,19826,19830,19846,19871,19885,19886,19887,19888,19889,19954,19989,20145,20146,20147,20215,20221,20255,20295,20298,20318,20319,20325,20399,20404,20430,31047,31167,31168,31183,31186,31299,31302,31308,31398,31437,31452,31463,31472,31483,31488,31512,31567,31568,31574,31600,31614,31673,31688,31699,410099,19554,19563,19564,19638,19732,19736,19791,19792,19793,19794,19882,20166,20195,20230,20299,31505", ","), .@equip_id) == -1) { mes "คอสตูมส่วนกลางนี้ไม่รองรับ"; close; }
			setarray .@stone_id, 6642, 4882, 6643, 4883, 6717, 4927, 6742, 4931, 6743, 4861, 6744, 4929, 6945, 4700, 6946, 4710, 6947, 4730, 6948, 4720, 6949, 4740, 6950, 4750, 25001, 29026, 25002, 29024, 25003, 29014, 25004, 29022, 25005, 29016, 25006, 29020, 25007, 29018, 25060, 29047, 25061, 29048, 25070, 29054, 25141, 29145, 25173, 29157, 25175, 29155, 25410, 29424, 25414, 29429, 25418, 29433, 25446, 29461, 25451, 29465, 25454, 29469, 25491, 29478, 25495, 29482, 25499, 29486, 25707, 29514, 25711, 29518, 25715, 29522, 25799, 29612, 25803, 29616, 25807, 29620, 25844, 29652, 25847, 29656, 25851, 29660, 25856, 29665, 25860, 29669, 1000009, 310001, 1000013, 310005, 1000017, 310009, 1000215, 310182, 1000219, 310186, 1000223, 310190, 1000298, 310259, 1000302, 310263, 1000306, 310267; break;
		case EQI_COSTUME_HEAD_LOW:
			if (inarray(explode("19513,19514,19528,19552,19553,19566,19604,19606,19634,19636,19672,19783,19785,19798,19902,20034,20054,20071,20091,20132,20169,20202,20223,20239,20240,20305,20340,20342,20357,20358,20359,20360,20361,20362,20363,20364,20365,20366,20367,20368,20369,20370,20405,20407,20429,20440,20448,20462,20497,31029,31045,31057,31063,31064,31065,31066,31067,31068,31069,31070,31079,31080,31081,31082,31083,31084,31085,31086,31178,31189,31210,31211,31212,31213,31214,31215,31216,31217,31226,31227,31228,31229,31230,31231,31232,31233,31251,31296,31300,31315,31330,31381,31383,31393,31395,31404,31432,31438,31450,31453,31460,31473,31490,31492,31493,31498,31533,31572,31586,31611,31616,31625,31698", ","), .@equip_id) == -1) { mes "คอสตูมส่วนล่างนี้ไม่รองรับ"; close; }
			setarray .@stone_id, 6644, 4884, 6645, 4859, 6718, 4928, 6745, 4932, 6951, 4861, 25008, 29021, 25009, 29023, 25010, 29019, 25011, 29025, 25012, 29015, 25013, 29017, 25014, 29033, 25015, 29027, 25016, 29029, 25017, 29031, 25062, 29046, 25063, 29049, 25064, 29050, 25065, 29051, 25066, 29052, 25071, 29055, 25072, 29057, 25139, 29146, 25174, 29158, 25227, 29227, 25228, 29229, 25229, 29228, 25305, 29360, 25411, 29425, 25415, 29430, 25419, 29434, 25447, 29462, 25452, 29466, 25455, 29470, 25492, 29479, 25496, 29483, 25500, 29487, 25708, 29515, 25712, 29519, 25716, 29523, 25798, 29611, 25802, 29615, 25806, 29619, 25845, 29653, 25848, 29657, 25852, 29661, 25857, 29666, 25861, 29670, 1000010, 310002, 1000014, 310006, 1000018, 310010, 1000216, 310183, 1000220, 310185, 1000224, 310189, 1000299, 310260, 1000303, 310264, 1000307, 310268; break;
	}

	// 4. ลูปแสดงเมนูหิน
	deletearray .@valid_index;
	.@menu$ = ""; .@valid_count = 0;
	for (.@i = 0; .@i < getarraysize(.@stone_id); .@i += 2) {
		if (countitem(.@stone_id[.@i]) > 0) {
			.@menu$ += getitemname(.@stone_id[.@i]) + " [มี " + countitem(.@stone_id[.@i]) + " ชิ้น]:";
			.@valid_index[.@valid_count] = .@i;
			.@valid_count++;
		}
	}
	if (.@valid_count == 0) { mes "ไม่มีหินออฟชั่นในตัว"; close; }
	.@menu$ += "ยกเลิก";
	.@pick = select(.@menu$) - 1;
	if (.@pick == .@valid_count) close;

	.@s = .@valid_index[.@pick];
	.@stone = .@stone_id[.@s];
	.@enchant = .@stone_id[.@s+1];

	if (select("ใช้ " + getitemname(.@stone) + "?", "ยกเลิก") == 2) close;
	
	// 5. ดำเนินการ
	close2;
	specialeffect2 100;
	dispbottom "กำลังหลอมรวมออฟชั่น...";
	progressbar "00FF00", 2;
	delitem .@stone, 1;
	delequip .@part;

	setarray .@card[0], getequipcardid(.@part,0), getequipcardid(.@part,1), getequipcardid(.@part,2), getequipcardid(.@part,3);
	if (rand(1, 100) <= 50) {
		specialeffect2 154; // สำเร็จ
		.@card[(.@part == EQI_COSTUME_HEAD_TOP ? 0 : (.@part == EQI_COSTUME_HEAD_MID ? 1 : 2))] = .@enchant;
		dispbottom "สำเร็จ!";
	} else {
		specialeffect2 155; // ล้มเหลว
		dispbottom "ล้มเหลว!";
	}
	
	getitem2 .@equip_id, 1, 1, getequiprefinerycnt(.@part), 0, .@card[0], .@card[1], .@card[2], .@card[3];
	end;
}
